title: Kittur Fort
tagline: Kittur Fort — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Kittur is a fort located in the Karnataka state of India, it is the former capital of a minor principality as well as a major archaeological site.

topPlaces.name: Kittur
topPlaces.description: Kittur or Kitturu, historically known as Kittoor, is a town and a taluk in the Belagavi district of the Indian state of Karnataka. It was part of Bailhongal taluka but was declared as an independent taluka on 23 October 2012 by the Chief Minister of Karnataka on the inauguration of Kittur Utsav.

topPlaces.name: Ugarkhod
topPlaces.description: Ugarkhod is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India. Ugarkhod is located 21 kilometres (13 mi) from Bylahongal and 36 kilometres (22 mi) from Belgaum.

topPlaces.name: Basarkhod
topPlaces.description: Basarkhod is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Marigeri
topPlaces.description: Marigeri is a village in Belgaum district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Degaon
topPlaces.description: Degaon is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is famous for Kadamba style Kamala Narayana Temple.

topPlaces.name: Kamala Narayana Temple
topPlaces.description: Kamala Narayana Temple is at Degaon in Belgaum District, Karnataka, India. The temple was built by the Kadamba dynasty.

topPlaces.name: Dematti
topPlaces.description: Dematti is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Degulhalli
topPlaces.description: Degulhalli is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

items.note: Kittur or Kitturu, historically known as Kittoor, is a town and a taluk in the Belagavi district of the Indian state of Karnataka. faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kittur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kittur Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kittur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Belagavi Airport (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (47 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kittur Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kittur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kittur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kittur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kittur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kittur, Ugarkhod, Basarkhod, Marigeri, Degaon.
